title: Immersive Driving
body:
Immersive Driving! 1.0.0 is here, Fear no more! The most reaserched minecraft flight/driving simulator is here with more than 76 hours of testing. Combined with _Los Perritos_ world download on planet minecraft this is the modpack of your dreams.

![Driving](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08b3f99f2ca8351ad61a774912c42fd0a90c379f_0.webp)

Works on any server.

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>
                                        - Immersive Vehicles IAV Parts Pack
                                              - R.A.G.E Immersive Vehichles
                  - [Immersive Vehicles/IV/MTS] VEB Automobilwerke Schwikau
                                      - Aviator Dreams (normal andreloaded)
                                                             - Ferrite Core
                                                         - Immidiatley Fast
                                                       - Immersive Aircraft
                                                    - Immersive Engineering
                                                      - Immersive Vehichles 
                                                       - Man Of Many Planes
                                - Immersive Vehichles Official Content Pack
                                                                 - New Cars
                                                              - Trank-O-Mat
                                                         - Ultimate Car Mod
                                                            - Warfare Wings



</details>
